name: Tombador Iron Limited
summary: Tombador Iron Limited engages in the exploration of iron projects in Brazil. The company explores for hematite, hematite-talus, itabirite, and itabirite-talus mineral resources. It owns Tombador iron ore project in the Sento S√É¬© municipality of northern Bahia State, Brazil. The company is based in Cottesloe, Australia.
